channel.title: Audrey Menegaz Proença | Tenaillon-Matic research group

item.title: Audrey M. Proença
item.description: I am a researcher interested in evolutionary microbiology and systems biology. My work combines single-cell microscopy, molecular engineering, and evolutionary theories to investigate the population dynamics of Escherichia coli. In particular, I am interested in the mechanisms that produce variation among individual cells, from divisional asymmetry to the emergence of mutations, and in the evolutionary consequences of this variation.
